series_metadata.series_description: This file contains all information on a brand of liquor sold in Ohio, (name, price, alcohol content, formula, distiller, origin of brand, bottler, etc.), an original of the label is included. The information is placed on the computer system for the compilation of reports. New labels and information are submitted as changes occur. (fna AO-104)

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in the office area until superseded, then destroy. ; Electronic: Information is continually maintained on mainframe and updated as it is superseded by new information., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Erase
